primary_application: laser cleaning for surface decontamination and preparation
material_properties_table:
| Property                  | Value                     |
| ---------------------------- | --------------------------- |
| Density                     | 0.1-0.3 g/cm³              |
| Thermal Conductivity        | 0.048-0.054 W/m·K          |
| Compressive Strength        | 10-20 MPa                  |
| Modulus of Elasticity       | 3-4 GPa                    |
| Ignition Temperature        | 250-300 °C                 |
| Moisture Content (typical)  | 10-15%                     |
| Hardness (Janka scale)      | 100-300 lbf                |
| Laser Absorption Coefficient | Moderate (varies by wavelength, e.g., ~0.5-0.8 for CO2 lasers at 10.6 µm) |
